step_by_step_thinking:
\boxed{B}
**Clinical Reasoning:** Circulating ring-shaped RNAs (circRNAs) are known to lack free ends, making them resistant to exonuclease digestion. RNase R, which degrades linear RNAs, cannot efficiently degrade circRNAs due to their closed-loop structure. Therefore, circRNAs remain stable under conditions where linear RNAs would otherwise be degraded.
